title: Doff 1L Fast Acting Weed Killer, F-FU-A00-DOF
features: EFFECTIVE ADVANCED WEED KILLER – Tackle stubborn annual and perennial broad-leaved weeds with Doff 24/7 Fast Acting Weedkiller. This spot treatment weed killer delivers a pure contact action with visible results within 24 hours, perfect for garden paths, patios, and driveways

READY-TO-USE CONVENIENCE – Save time with this pre-mixed non-selective weedkiller formula that requires no dilution, making application quick and hassle-free. Its adjustable nozzle ensures precise application. Simply apply directly from the bottle for fast and easy weed control where needed

ELIMINATE & PREVENT – This strong weedkiller solution eliminates weeds such as grasses, dandelions and more, destroying all green plant parts on contact. Spray when weeds are actively growing, directly onto the leaf area to absorb the spray

VERSATILE & RELIABLE – Designed to eliminate tough weeds like nettles and thistles, it’s perfect for any garden space needing a fresh, weed-free finish. Available in a 1L spray bottle, this root killer treats weeds in areas up to 30m² with quick and effective targeted action

WEEDED IN EXCELLENCE – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for weed control. Our quality-crafted solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering safe, effective weed management, helping your plants thrive while keeping unwanted growth at bay
